nodes.label: Mixed Content Support (MixedSidebarItem)
nodes.rationale: Allows mixing flat SidebarItems and grouped Groups in the same array for flexible navigation hierarchies without forcing users into one structure.

nodes.label: TabsContainer Component
nodes.rationale: Enhanced tabs with URL persistence (via nuqs), scrollable navigation arrows, and tabsLayout prop (compact/full) to give developers full control over tab state and UX without requiring custom wiring.

nodes.label: CSS Variables Theming System
nodes.rationale: CSS variables enable dark/light mode and easy customization without hardcoding colors, making the library themeable by consumers.
